name: Bioline Tuna & Scallop Cat Snacks 15g * 5
description: Bioline Tuna & Scallop Pet Snacks is a selection of high-quality tuna and salmon, cooked at high temperatures, ground in the form of pulp, good taste, and can be easily digested and absorbed. Main Ingredients: Water, Fish (Tuna), Scallops, Frozen Chicken Breast, Corn Starch. Additives: Xanthan Gum, Taurine, Vitamin A, Vitamin D, Vitamin E Application: For Cats upto 3 months old Storage Conditions: Please Keep in a cool and dry place below 25C, avoid direct sunlight. Instructions for Use: Can be added to food or given orally to Cats.
